amendment.description: To appropriate amounts for local law enforcement hiring programs.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5463 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 45 - 53. Record Vote Number: 160.

action.text: Amendment SA 5463 proposed by Senator Cortez Masto to Amendment SA 5453.
